name: Orange & Spice Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle roast with lemon juice and salt.
2. In a 12-inch ovenproof skillet, cook bacon until crisp. Remove from pan; crumble; set aside.
3. Brown roast in drippings. Drain fat.
4. In a medium bowl, combine bacon, undrained tomatoes, orange juice, onion, parsley (fresh or dried), sugar, cinnamon, garlic, cloves, and bay leaf. Pour over roast.
5. Bake, covered, at 325°F for 2 to 2 1/2 hours or until the roast is tender.
6. Transfer roast to a serving platter; cover with foil.
7. Remove cloves and bay leaf from pan juices.
8. Mix flour in water. Add to pan juices. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, about 1 minute.
9. Cook and stir for an additional minute.
10. Pass gravy over the meat.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
